---
title: "Kader Library"
description: "Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — one topic at a time, each built to actually make the idea click. A growing collection."
listing:
  contents: explainers/**/index.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 2
  categories: numbered
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, title, description, categories, date, reading-time]
  feed: true
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        .lib-hero{ border-radius:14px; padding:1.6rem 1.8rem; margin:.4rem 0 1.6rem;
          background:linear-gradient(135deg,#4C4A98,#6361b3); color:#fff; }
        .lib-hero h2{ color:#fff !important; margin:0 0 .4rem; font-size:1.5rem; border:none; }
        .lib-hero p{ margin:0; color:#e9e8ff; font-size:1rem; max-width:60ch; }
        .quarto-listing .card{ border-radius:14px; }
      </style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="lib-hero">
  <h2>📚 Kader Library</h2>
  <p>Illustrated, from-scratch explainers — each one built to make a single idea genuinely click, with diagrams and interactive bits. New chapters get added over time.</p>
</div>
```
